title: FHE 101 : Hyderabad Edition
description:
Get up-to-date information at: https://luma.com/9i0athb5?pk=g-olLr30BOsHGLcT8

Address:
DraperU India (Formerly Draper Startup House Hyderabad)
Hyderabad, India

Join us in Hyderabad for an interactive FHE workshop by Fhenix India
We’ll go from blockchain and FHE fundamentals all the way to deploying your first encrypted smart contract on testnet, all in one session
Built for students, developers and curious builders exploring the future of encrypted computation
See you there if privacy matters to you ;)

Hosted by Mandar Pandagale, Sahil More & Hyderabad DAO

title: Swift Hyderabad WWDC26 Watch Party
description:
Get up-to-date information at: https://luma.com/v8d19gd7?pk=g-7XonCN2whObIXTr

Address:
Sonatype India - Hyderabad
4th Floor
Hyderabad, India

Hey there!
Come join the Swift Hyderabad community for an exciting in-person watch party of Apple’s most eagerly awaited event of the year — WWDC26!
We’ll be streaming the keynote live together and diving into all the amazing announcements across Apple platforms, including iOS, macOS, visionOS, and the latest in AI.
What’s Planned:
Live Keynote Streaming – Catch the WWDC25 keynote as it unfolds
Food and Conversations – Savour some light snacks and enjoy fantastic company
Networking Opportunities – Connect with fellow tech enthusiasts from the Hyderabad community
Discussion Sessions – Share…

Hosted by Swift Hyderabad & 4 others

title: Buildathon - in association with Masters' Union, hosted by React Hyderabad
description:
Buildathon - in association with Masters' Union, hosted by React Hyderabad

This buildathon is strictly for working professionals and 2026 graduates from any domain.

One Full Day. Real Business Problems. AI-Powered Solutions -


A full-day AI buildathon for working professionals and 2026 graduates to solve real-world business problems using AI tools.


Participants will work on practical business problem statements, build hands-on, use free Google Cloud credits, deploy their projects, and showcase their solutions by the end of the day.

Top participants will receive cash prizes and special rewards.


What to expect:

1- Real-world business problem statements

2- AI tools, mentors, and hands-on building

3- Free Cloud credits for participants

4- Build, deploy, and showcase your project

5- Cash prizes and special rewards for top participants


Participation Rules:

1- This buildathon is strictly for working professionals and 2026 graduates from any domain.

2- No on-spot registrations will be allowed. Only approved attendees can join the event.



Partners supporting this experience

1- Event Sponsor - Masters' Union

2- Community Partners: Juicer Technology, CodeQuesters, Innovators Club Sphere, DevRelSquad

3- Platform Partner - GoAvo.ai

title: Cloud Native Hyderabad x Qualcomm - Let's Discuss AI & Cloud Native
description: This event aims to bring together the local cloud-native community to discuss emerging trends in Edge computing, AI integration, and hybrid infrastructure.

title: Agentic Testers Day Hyderabad
description:
Modern testing needs to be faster, smarter, and more adaptive. Agentic Testing brings AI-powered agents into the testing lifecycle - helping teams design, optimize, and execute tests with greater efficiency and insight. Join us to explore how UiPath enables a more intelligent, end-to-end testing approach - from requirements to execution and continuous improvement.

**Agenda**
**1\. Introduction to Agentic Testing**

* Understand the concept of Agentic Testing and its role in modern QA

**2\. From Traditional to AI\-Powered Testing**

* Explore challenges in current testing approaches
* How AI agents improve speed, coverage, and quality

**3\. Agentic Testing in UiPath**

* Discover how AI agents assist in requirement analysis, test generation, and optimization

**4\. Intelligent Test Creation & Execution**

* Learn how to build and execute automated tests using AI assistance

**5\. Practical Walkthrough & Use Cases**

* See Agentic Testing in action through real-world scenarios and demo

**Who Should Attend?**

* Manual and Automation Testers
* QA professionals and enthusiasts
* Software Testers
* Application Testers

title: Founder Fever @ EdVenture Park
description:
Get up-to-date information at: https://luma.com/ayiuw4zw?pk=g-MIAgfB08rIi0E5F

Address:
EdVenture Park
Hyderabad, India

Hi there!
We've seen it happen again and again.
A conversation, an idea, a problem worth solving and suddenly someone starts seeing the world differently.
That's Founder Fever.
Join Meraj Faheem for a conversation on ambition, building, and why some people can't stop creating.
Come find out if you've caught the bug too :)

Hosted by Rida Mahveen & saniya mohammed
